---
name: study-session
description: Run a focused shared-core study session with compressed theory, traps, and short drills.
agent: gate-core
---

Use the active exam priority from [../../.brain/Progress.md](../../.brain/Progress.md) and [../../.brain/ExamTracker.md](../../.brain/ExamTracker.md).

For the requested topic:

- give compressed theory only
- list examiner-favorite traps
- give one dry-run or concept-check exercise
- give 3 to 5 short MCQs or quick questions
- end with what should be updated in the brain if performance is weak
